incidents.detail: Norway breaks on the counter-attack; Ødegaard receives the ball on the right wing and cuts inside before striking a low shot that finds the bottom corner from 18 yards.
Seko Fofana is cautioned for a reckless challenge on Morten Thorsby in midfield.
Simon Adingra strikes a powerful free kick from 22 yards after a foul on the left flank; his effort curves over the wall and nestles in the top corner.
Birger Meling receives a yellow card for a tactical foul on Wilfried Singo on the left wing.
Sander Berge powers home a header from a pinpoint cross delivered by Julian Ryerson from the right wing, beating Yahia Fofana at the near post.
Odilon Kossounou is booked for a dangerous foul on Martin Ødegaard near the penalty area.
